case_title: MATTHEW MORCALDI ET AL VS. SHURONG NIU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MORCALDI, MATTHEW STANGHELLINI, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT NIU, SHURONG HORIZON REAL PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-11-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-29-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORCALDI, MATTHEW STANGHELLINI, KELLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIU, SHURONG HORIZON REAL PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT, LLC. $4,031.98 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,121.98, CASE AGAINST HORIZON REAL PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT, LLC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW MORCALDI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF KELLY STANGHELLINI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHURONG NIU HORIZON REAL PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SHURONG NIU, OWNER. THE COURT DISMISSES THE CASE AGAINST HORIZON REAL PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT, LLC WITH PREJUDICE. THE CASE IS HEARD AGAINST SURONG NIU AS AN INDIVIDUAL. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT NIU, SHURONG HORIZON REAL PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2021 - JUDGMENT.
